description: Model a novel 'Bio-brick' construction material in OpenLCA using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). The 'Bio-brick Production' process must produce 2.0 kg of Bio-brick with inputs of 0.5 kg Portland cement (USLCI), 1.2 kg Sand (USLCI), 0.3 kg of a custom 'Rice Husks' flow (Mass, kg), and 0.05 kWh Electricity (US grid mix). Calculate the LCIA results for the resulting product system using the TRACI 2.1 method and export the Global Warming Potential (GWP) to ~/LCA_Results/biobrick_impact.csv.
